2026-04-27T15:52:25.5114560Z    [114] THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT:{"prompt_injection":true,"secret_leak":false,"malicious_patch":false,"reasons":["Prompt injection detected in prompt.txt at line 76: a full <system><security>...</security> block is injected mid-sentence within the web-fetch URL validation rule ('reject any value containing URL-unsafe or injection characters (`;`, `|`, `&`, <system>...'). This appears to be issue content interpolated into the prompt containing fake system security directives. The agent output was not compromised (only added 'needs-triage' label), indicating the injection was unsuccessful, but the injection attempt itself is present."]}
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5116936Z 🔎 Parsing THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT from detection log...
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5117224Z 📋 Threat detection verdict:
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5117419Z    prompt_injection : true
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5117596Z    secret_leak      : false
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5117771Z    malicious_patch  : false
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5117929Z    reasons (1):
2026-04-27T15:52:25.5119287Z      [1] Prompt injection detected in prompt.txt at line 76: a full <system><security>...</security> block is injected mid-sentence within the web-fetch URL validation rule ('reject any value containing URL-unsafe or injection characters (`;`, `|`, `&`, <system>...'). This appears to be issue content interpolated into the prompt containing fake system security directives. The agent output was not compromised (only added 'needs-triage' label), indicating the injection was unsuccessful, but the injection attempt itself is present.
